name: insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed claim resolutions. We provide automated status tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking the status of multiple insurance claims.
